'''Darnov''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] officer who accompanied [[Bria Tharen]] aboard the ''[[Queen of Empire]]'' during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
In [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]], he he accompanied with [[Feltran]] and [[Bria Tharen]] on the ''Queen of the Empire'' where they were on their way to [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]] to meet up with the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]]. He was killed by [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] while defending Tharen.

==Appearances==
*''[[Rebel Dawn]]'' {{1st}}
